name: Thai Polycons Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Polycons Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides construction services in Thailand. It undertakes construction of building, commercial building, power plant, infrastructure, hospital, and residential building projects. The company also engages in the property development activities; trading business; and production and trading of electricity. In addition, it invests in energy business. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
